assertions.title: Partial row does NOT trigger bingo

steps.action: Set sessionStorage marks to [0,1,2,3] (4 of 5 in row 1) and reload
steps.observed: 4 squares in row 1 marked (pressed), no alert element in DOM, no celebration visible
Only grid, buttons, and seed paragraph in DOM — no alert or celebration

steps.action: Navigate to /game?seed=bingoedge with empty sessionStorage marks []
steps.expected: Fresh unmarked board with no bingo or celebration state
steps.observed: All 25 squares unmarked (no [pressed] attribute), no alert element in DOM, no celebration visible
Only grid with unpressed buttons, New Game, Share buttons, and seed paragraph

assertions.title: Unmarking a square from a completed row clears bingo

steps.action: Set sessionStorage marks to [0,1,2,3,4] (all 5 in row 1) and reload
steps.observed: Alert element with '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' appears in DOM, confetti overlay rendered

steps.action: Set sessionStorage marks to [1,2,3,4] (unmark index 0) and reload
steps.observed: No alert element in DOM, no celebration visible. Square at index 0 unmarked, remaining 4 squares still pressed

evidence.consoleErrors: hydration mismatch warnings (expected — SSR renders unmarked, client loads marks from sessionStorage)

steps.action: Set sessionStorage marks to [0,1,2,3,4,10,11,12,13,14] (row 1 + row 3 fully marked) and reload
steps.expected: No crash, no duplicate celebrations, bingo state visible
steps.observed: Single alert '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' in DOM, confetti overlay rendered, both rows fully pressed, no crash
Only hydration mismatch warnings (expected), no runtime errors or crashes

evidence.consoleErrors: hydration mismatch warnings only (expected — not application errors)

assertions.title: Bingo detection works when center square is part of the line

steps.action: Set sessionStorage marks to [10,11,13,14] (row 3 minus center at index 12) and reload
steps.observed: 4 squares in row 3 pressed, center 'Gets nerdsniped' NOT pressed, no alert in DOM

steps.action: Set sessionStorage marks to [10,11,12,13,14] (row 3 including center) and reload
steps.observed: All 5 squares in row 3 pressed including center 'Gets nerdsniped', alert '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' visible in DOM

assertions.title: Filling entire board triggers multiple bingos

steps.expected: Bingo triggered, no crash from 12 possible bingos
steps.observed: All 25 squares pressed, single alert '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' visible, no crash, page rendered correctly
Errors cleared before check — page loaded and functioned correctly with full blackout

evidence.consoleErrors: none (errors cleared before check — no crash observed)

frictions.description: Hydration mismatch warnings appear when marks are loaded from sessionStorage because the server renders without marks and the client hydrates with marks. This is expected behavior for client-side state persistence but causes console noise.
frictions.resolution: Identified as expected behavior — SSR cannot access sessionStorage, so hydration mismatch is inherent to the architecture. Not a bug.

frictions.description: agent-browser screenshot commands occasionally time out on first attempt after page reload with celebration overlay active. Used sessionStorage manipulation instead of clicks to avoid Playwright click timeout on celebration overlay.
frictions.resolution: Used JS eval to set sessionStorage marks directly and reload, as recommended in task notes

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Bingo detection edge cases work correctly — partial rows don't trigger bingo, empty board has no false positive, unmarking clears bingo, multiple bingos are handled gracefully, center square is not auto-marked, and full blackout (12 possible bingos) doesn't crash the app.
